options.command: migrate -database "$NOTIFICATION_READ_POSTGRES_STR" -path infrastructure/db_read/migrations up && migrate -database "$NOTIFICATION_WRITE_POSTGRES_STR" -path infrastructure/db_write/migrations up
migrate -database "$NOTIFICATION_READ_POSTGRES_STR" -path infrastructure/db_read/migrations down && migrate -database "$NOTIFICATION_WRITE_POSTGRES_STR" -path infrastructure/db_write/migrations down
